'''Stargerms''' were aquatic animals native to [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]]. These creatures jumped out of the [[Water/Legends|water]] to grab prey, and then returned to the water to consume them.<ref name="SEMP" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Super Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-11-XX -->''[[Super Empire Strikes Back Official Game Secrets]]'' {{1stID|Stargerm}}
